name: Console Print
description: Prints the input data to the console.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class ConsolePrintNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Console Print"
    description = "Prints the input data to the console."
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/terminal.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_exec_input("exec_in")
        self.add_input("data", "any", widget_type="text")
        self.add_exec_output("exec_out")
        self.add_output("out", "any")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    def on_parameter_changed(self, name, value):
        # Reactive behavior: print as soon as data arrives (even before execute)
        if name == "data" and value is not None:
            self.log_info(f"[REACTIVE PRINT]: {value}")
            # Also update output so downstream nodes can react too
            self.parameters['out'] = value
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        data_val = inputs.get("data")
        data = str(data_val) if data_val is not None else ""
        self.log_success(f"[FINAL PRINT]: {data}")
        return {"out": data}

def register_node():
    return ConsolePrintNode
